failedAssertions.reason: Deterministic alternative sort order violation at position 14 (token=' jumps') in non-streaming /v1/completions with temp=0.0 and top_logprobs=5. The 3 alternatives after the chosen token are NOT sorted descending: '...' (-21.125) appears before ' jams' (-20.5625). Reproducible across 3 runs. 149/150 total positions tested have correct sort order. Chosen token IS always first. Root cause appears to be in LogprobsCollector.capture() where alternatives.sort { $0.logprob > $1.logprob } produces incorrect order for this specific set of Float logprobs. The fix from commit c77670c (round 2) dramatically improved from 9/9 unsorted to 1/150 unsorted, but one edge case remains.
